_instructions: Map CSV column names to the standard names used by this system. Set any field to null if that column does not exist in data. Pedestrian columns are always optional.
_notes: If  data has no right-turn or left-turn columns, set those to null — they will be treated as 0.
If  data has no separate date column, set date to null.
slot_minutes must match the interval between rows in data (e.g. 15 for 15-min counts, 60 for hourly).
Approaches not in intersection_config active_approaches are ignored even if mapped here.
